label: 3337 Startup funding

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: For purposes of this chapter, the Secretary of the Treasury shall pay to the Appraisal Subcommittee a one-time payment of $5,000,000 on . Thereafter, expenses of the subcommittee shall be funded through the collection of registry fees from certain certified and licensed appraisers pursuant to or, if required, pursuant to section 3351(b) of this title.August 9, 1989section 3338 of this title1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Additional funds
children.label: b Additional funds
children.text: Except as provided in section 3351(b) of this title, funds in addition to the funds provided under subsection (a) may be made available to the Appraisal Subcommittee only if authorized and appropriated by law.1

children.heading: Repayment of Treasury loan
children.label: c Repayment of Treasury loan
children.text: Not later than , the Appraisal Subcommittee shall repay to the Secretary of the Treasury the unpaid portion of the $5,000,000 paid to the Appraisal Subcommittee pursuant to this section.September 30, 1998
